pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate annotation dependency from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes required for modern JDKs.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is deprecated and may not be available or compatible in strict Jakarta EE environments on JDK 21; migration to jakarta.annotation is standard for modern Java stacks.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/domain/s.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 API.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/domain/s.why_exists: List.getFirst() is not available in Java 17, causing a compilation error if the code is compiled against an older JDK.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/domain/s.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 API.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/domain/s.why_exists: List.getFirst() is not available in Java 17, causing a compilation error if the code is compiled against an older JDK.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.why_exists: Java 21 enforces that serialVersionUID fields in serializable classes must be annotated with @Serial (or be effectively final and private static final long) to avoid compile-time errors regarding serialization metadata.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the new annotation on serialVersionUID.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is part of java.io package introduced in Java 14 and enforced in Java 21; without the import, the code will not compile.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct semantic marking of serialization metadata in modern Java.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is defined in java.io.Serial; without the import, the code will fail to compile with an 'cannot find symbol' error.

src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to adopt Java 21 API.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.why_exists: List.get(0) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it triggers deprecation warnings and will cause compilation errors in future JDK versions.
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.before: dao.read(Log.class, "select log from Log as log where log.id = :logid",param).get(0)
src/main/java/main/cl/dagserver/infra/ad.after: dao.read(Log.class, "select log from Log as log where log.id = :logid",param).getFirst()
